display_text: Anti-Mage Aghanim's Scepter: Enhances Blink to burn an additional 20% max mana and prevent mana regeneration or gain upon Mana Break. This upgrade counters mana-reliant heroes by severely crippling their ability to cast spells, making Anti-Mage a more effective anti-caster assassin.
search_text: Anti-Mage Aghanim Scepter anti-caster mana burn prevent mana regeneration spell cripple

display_text: Anti-Mage Aghanim's Shard: Creates a blinked fragment of Anti-Mage next to enemy casters upon reflecting their spell. This counters spell-reliant heroes by positioning Anti-Mage aggressively during Counterspell activation, enabling immediate counter-pressure.
search_text: Anti-Mage Aghanim Shard anti-caster spell reflection counter-pressure
